blocks.content: The desert heat was rising day by day, as if a lens had been placed over the continent.

blocks.speaker: Kanis
blocks.content: This is brutal.
Kanis shielded his eyes from the sun with his hand.
Due to the scorching heat of the Fifth Legion Commander Marbas's demon realm, even the oases had dried up.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Frigi and Argan are restoring the oases in each city. But it won't last more than three days…
Zulu pointed to the horizon.

blocks.speaker: Zulu
blocks.content: There it is.
A massive oasis shimmered like a mirage.

blocks.speaker: Kanis
blocks.content: Nagnak. It means the Holy Grail of the Gods. It's a royal territory directly managed by the Kingdom of Paras.
Arin stuck out her tongue.

blocks.speaker: Arin
blocks.content: Water.
Although they could create water with magic, the sight of an oasis was refreshing in itself.

blocks.speaker: Kanis
blocks.content: The area within a six-kilometer radius around the Pyramid of Truth is a restricted zone. That's why pilgrims, travelers, and explorers all gather in Nagnak. It's the closest point that ordinary people can access.
Shirone took out a permit.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: If we submit this to the National Treasure Management Department in Nagnak, the soldiers will guide us.
While they were talking, they arrived in Nagnak.
It was a community of about 200 households, with many outsiders roaming around.

blocks.speaker: Arin
blocks.content: Wow…
As a cool breeze blew, Arin took off her cloak and dried her sweat.

blocks.speaker: Arin
blocks.content: Kanis, look over there. The oasis hasn't dried up. It didn't rain while we were staying in the royal palace.

blocks.speaker: Kanis
blocks.content: That's because…
Just as Shirone was about to explain, two familiar apostles walked in from the village.

blocks.speaker: Arin
blocks.content: Dragons.
When Arin mentioned what she saw, Kanis's shadow lengthened sharply.

blocks.speaker: Frigi
blocks.content: We've been waiting for you, Messiah.
With silver hair and a cold appearance, she never showed emotion, even in front of Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Argan
blocks.content: The oasis is holding up well.

blocks.speaker: Argan
blocks.content: We used our breath to work on it three days ago. We were planning to tour other villages, but we received a message from Kira and are on standby in polymorph form.

blocks.speaker: Arin
blocks.content: Speaking of which, where is Kira?

blocks.speaker: Argan
blocks.content: She was supposed to wait with us, but she received an urgent telegram from the Ivory Tower and left.

blocks.speaker: Arin
blocks.content: Telegram?
Shirone raised an eyebrow.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Kingdom of Stang.
When Shirone called, a beam of light flew through the sky and landed in front of him.

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: You called for me.
It was Lampa, a three-star resident of the Ivory Tower and an authority on information magic.

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: I heard Kira from the Kingdom of Paras received an urgent telegram and left. What's going on?
Unless it was a special case, all matters were reported to the Five Stars.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Well…
After hearing the explanation, Shirone's expression became serious.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: So they've finally shown themselves.

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: Yes. The army of hell, led by the First Legion Commander Baal, is engaged in battle with the Kingdom of Corona. The situation is tense. All the stars except for you have been summoned to the Ivory Tower.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The Kingdom of Corona is not weak. What the Great Star is concerned about is… the demon realm?

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: Deadly Cross. Baal, or rather Havits, intends to bring down the Ivory Tower.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But they haven't opened the demon realm yet. There must be a deeper motive.

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: They're likely considering the Holy War. Since Corona is participating, they want to hold the Ivory Tower hostage and gain an advantageous position in negotiations.
Shirone's head was already throbbing.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But why wasn't I called? I could handle it with a simultaneous event.

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: It was the Great Star's order. The reason is unclear, but the atmosphere in the Ivory Tower is different from before.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Mr. Freed and Mr. Amanta. The System Surveillance Department and the Balance Department have lost their Five Stars. Losing ten stars in the entire Ivory Tower is a significant loss. For now, we have no choice but to absorb and integrate, with Ms. Sing at the center.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Sing.
The Five Star of the Law Department.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Mr. Sing's perspective on the world is different from yours, Shirone. Although it hasn't surfaced yet, the stars and residents of the Ivory Tower are likely making their own decisions. While Ms. Minerva is upholding Yahweh's banner, many are presumed to follow Ms. Sing's perspective.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: That's unexpected.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I believed we had shared many interactions and understood each other, even if not fully.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What caused the sudden change in perspective?

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: The atmosphere is not good. A grand assembly is necessary, but with the Holy War and the intense battle in Corona, it seems the Great Star has only blocked your summoning.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Is it that serious? Ms. Sing is strong, but I haven't been idle in the Ivory Tower either.

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: That's because…

blocks.speaker: Lampa
blocks.content: Ms. Sing has approved the Law of Taeguk. This has shocked the stars and residents.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Taeguk.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Two people came to Shirone's mind.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Umji and Yangji.
In Sing's room, twin sisters who looked identical entered.

blocks.speaker: Umji
blocks.content: You called for us.
Umji and Yangji.

blocks.speaker: Yangji
blocks.content: Yes. What's the situation in Corona?

blocks.speaker: Yangji
blocks.content: Nothing significant. Baal's army is the most elite force in hell, but I can wipe them out. Please send us immediately.

blocks.speaker: Umji
blocks.content: We must be cautious until all the stars have gathered. First, we need to strengthen the internal unity of the Ivory Tower…

blocks.speaker: Yangji
blocks.content: If we use our Taeguk, Sing's law will reach the absolute pinnacle. Let's just go. We'll wipe out the demon army and tear Baal apart.

blocks.speaker: Umji
blocks.content: That's nonsense.

blocks.speaker: Umji
blocks.content: If Baal dies, Havitz will come. If one dies in Taeguk, it will lead to the annihilation of the Ivory Tower. The demons will take over the world. They will torture humans, and we will be captured by them…

blocks.speaker: Umji
blocks.content: We'll suffer all kinds of things. They won't kill us easily. We'll end our lives in agony, writhing and screaming. In the end, there will be only pain. It's over. This world is doomed!

blocks.speaker: Yangji
blocks.content: It's not doomed! We have eight stars with the law of Taeguk. No Five Star is higher than us! Ah, Sing, I'm sorry. I didn't mean to offend you.

blocks.speaker: Yangji
blocks.content: So what! We're just humans in the end! No different from worms in the ground. Living beings are insignificant! We can never, ever defeat Satan!

blocks.speaker: Sing
blocks.content: Enough of this… Stop.
Umji and Yangji's expressions reset simultaneously, and they stood side by side like twins again.

blocks.speaker: Sing
blocks.content: I understand your thoughts. But I won't make any decisions. First, we need to win over the residents of the Ivory Tower. Start from there.

blocks.speaker: Umji
blocks.content: With all due respect, why are we splitting up? I thought you liked Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Sing
blocks.content: I don't trust anyone. I accepted you to enforce my will. Convey my intentions to the stars of the System Surveillance Department. It will be fine if you both go.
As Umji and Yangji left the room, Sing turned to the window overlooking the atmosphere.

blocks.speaker: Sing
blocks.content: Shirone.
If she had to choose, she definitely liked him.

blocks.speaker: Sing
blocks.content: Understand me.
Nagnak Oasis.
Regardless of the situation in the Ivory Tower, Shirone focused on what needed to be done in Paras.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Let's get going.
The group headed to the government office in the center of the village.
It was the only stone house, and across the table, a junior staff member was arguing with some pilgrims.

blocks.speaker: Staff member
blocks.content: We're not asking to go inside! You can't even see the pyramid from here!

blocks.speaker: Pilgrim
blocks.content: It's the king's order. The number of people visiting this place has increased tenfold in the past two months. Go back.

blocks.speaker: Pilgrim
blocks.content: Then at least let my family go! We'll return as soon as we cure the emotional illness…

blocks.speaker: Staff member
blocks.content: Do you know how many people I deal with daily who talk like you? This isn't a hospital! Go back before I call security!
Shirone looked at the carving on the building wall.
'The Pyramid of Truth.'
The image of a large eye floating above the pyramid was engraved in relief.
'The All-Seeing Eye.'

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Did the ancients know about the eye of the outer world?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The ancient civilization isn't recorded in Omega. If we're not careful, all the data could be lost. But…
The fact that the ancients traveled to the Pyramid of Truth was evident from the symbol.
When it was his turn, Shirone approached the table with the pass given directly by the king.

blocks.speaker: Staff member
blocks.content: Hello. The Pyramid of Truth…

blocks.speaker: Staff member
blocks.content: Didn't you hear what I said? How many times do I have to repeat myself? Do you think working in the middle of the desert is a joke?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: No, that's not it…
As Shirone handed over the pass, someone at the end of the table shouted.

blocks.speaker: Explorer
blocks.content: What are you talking about? I got permission four months ago! From the Minister of Land Management!

blocks.speaker: Staff member
blocks.content: That was four months ago. Don't you know the world situation? The king's name has changed. This document is useless.

blocks.speaker: Explorer
blocks.content: Four months is a tight schedule! An archaeological expedition isn't a joke, with all the manpower and equipment…

blocks.speaker: Staff member
blocks.content: Enough. If it's not allowed, it's not allowed. Go back.
The staff member turned back to Shirone, smirking.

blocks.speaker: Staff member
blocks.content: See? Even the minister's influence doesn't work here. So…
As he was about to return the pass, his eyes widened.

blocks.speaker: Staff member
blocks.content: What? This…
The seal of King Kitra of Paras was prominently stamped in the middle of the pass.

blocks.speaker: Staff member
blocks.content: My apologies!
The pale-faced staff member stood up abruptly, shouting, and everyone turned to look.

blocks.speaker: Explorer
blocks.content: Even the explorer at the end of the table looked at Shirone's group but quickly turned back to the staff.

blocks.speaker: Explorer
blocks.content: Anyway, if this isn't approved, I'll formally sue the Kingdom of Paras…
The staff member assigned to Shirone spoke.

blocks.speaker: Staff member
blocks.content: Please, come this way.
As they left the table and guided the group, the explorer suddenly realized.

blocks.speaker: Explorer
blocks.content: Hey! Those people! They're going to the Pyramid of Truth, aren't they? What's going on? I thought it was off-limits?

blocks.speaker: Staff member
blocks.content: What are you talking about? The king…
Ignoring the staff, the explorer turned and followed Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Explorer
blocks.content: Hey, you there! Wait a minute!
When Shirone turned around, the explorer with a beard down to his chest grabbed his shoulder.

blocks.speaker: Explorer
blocks.content: You got approval, didn't you?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Well, that's…

blocks.speaker: Explorer
blocks.content: Tell me! No, take me with you! Our team has been preparing for a long time! We can help.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Sorry. We're…

blocks.speaker: Explorer
blocks.content: I'll pay! Is it because of the emotional illness? Or the ancient relics? Please…
The explorer, half out of his mind, suddenly scrutinized Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Explorer
blocks.content: Shirone?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What?
At that moment, the explorer's eyes glowed red.

blocks.speaker: Explorer
blocks.content: Haha! Yes, Shirone! It's really you!

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Mr. Ares?
It was Amy's second brother.
